idea-plugin.name: DiffGuard
idea-plugin.description:
DiffGuard reviews selected Git changes in IntelliJ IDEA before commit using an OpenAI-compatible chat completion API configured by the user.

It adds a Review with DiffGuard action to the Commit and Changes views, sends the selected unified diff and local code context to the configured provider, and renders structured findings in a dedicated DiffGuard tool window.

  • Review selected changes before commit.
  • Use OpenAI-compatible providers with a custom Base URL, API key, and model.
  • Store API keys in IntelliJ PasswordSafe instead of plugin files.
  • Show findings grouped by severity with clickable file locations.
  • Support workspace guidance files and ignore patterns for project-specific review focus.

Privacy: DiffGuard sends code diffs and optional context only to the provider endpoint configured by the user. DiffGuard does not operate a hosted service and does not bundle API keys into the plugin package.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Initial Marketplace release.
  • Review selected Git changes with OpenAI-compatible models.
  • Display structured findings in the DiffGuard tool window.
  • Store API keys through IntelliJ PasswordSafe.
